title: New fab_plan_context(paths[]) MCP tool — batch multi-path rule queries for planning phase
description: (OPTIONAL — can skip to ship core Shadow Mirroring faster) New MCP tool fab_plan_context that accepts paths: string[] + optional client_hash. Returns aggregated rules from multiple paths in one call: {revision_hash, stale, entries: [{path, rules}]}. Service layer reuses get-rules logic, batches execution, and deduplicates cross-cutting scope_glob matches. Register in packages/server/src/index.ts. Tool description emphasizes Plan/Architecture phase use. This complements the bootstrap protocol upgrade (TASK-005) by enabling efficient multi-path context gathering at planning phase without N sequential fab_get_rules calls.

files.change: Create fab_plan_context tool definition: params {paths: string[], client_hash?: string}; description explains batch multi-path rule query for planning/architecture phase; registers tool handler calling planContextService.

Create planContextService: takes paths[], calls getRulesService for each path, deduplicates rules from overlapping scope_glob matches (rules from _cross/ files with global scope_glob appear once not N times), returns {revision_hash, stale, entries: [{path, rules}]}.
Import and register fab_plan_context tool alongside existing fab_get_rules and other tools.

implementation: Read packages/server/src/tools/get-rules.ts and packages/server/src/services/get-rules.ts to understand existing tool/service pattern before implementing
Design planContextService: iterate paths[], call getRulesForPath() for each, collect rules, deduplicate by (scope_glob + content) hash to avoid duplicates from _cross/ global matches
Implement packages/server/src/tools/plan-context.ts following get-rules.ts tool registration pattern
Write unit tests: multi-path deduplication correctness, cross-cutting scope_glob aggregation

reference.examples: Follow exact tool registration and service injection patterns from get-rules; reuse minimatch-based scope_glob matching from get-rules.ts:38

criteria: Tool accepts paths: string[] and optional client_hash
Cross-cutting rules (scope_glob matching multiple paths) deduplicated — appear once in aggregated output not N times
Unit test: 3 paths with overlapping _cross/ scope_glob returns deduplicated rules

rationale.chosen_approach: New tool + service following existing get-rules pattern; reuse service logic rather than duplicating
alternatives_considered: Extend fab_get_rules to accept paths[] array (breaking change to existing tool signature)
Client-side batching via N sequential fab_get_rules calls (N round-trips vs 1)
decision_factors: Planning phase may need context for 5-15 files simultaneously; sequential calls are slow
Deduplication of cross-cutting rules is server-side concern — client cannot know which rules overlap
rationale.tradeoffs: New tool increases server surface; optional so can defer

manual_checks: Call fab_plan_context with 3 paths in werewolf fixture; verify rules returned per path and cross-cutting _cross/ rules deduplicated
success_metrics: Unit tests pass: multi-path aggregation + deduplication
unit: plan-context.test.ts: multi-path rule aggregation with cross-cutting deduplication
plan-context.test.ts: stale detection when revision_hash changes

key_functions.signature: planContextService(paths: string[], clientHash?: string): {revision_hash: string; stale: boolean; entries: Array<{path: string; rules: string}>}
key_functions.purpose: Batch multi-path rule aggregation with cross-cutting deduplication for planning phase
